nodes.name: 峡谷峭壁
nodes.summary: 大型猛禽和食腐鸟偏好的高崖栖息环境。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 褐背针尾雨燕
nodes.summary: 褐背针尾雨燕（Brown-backed needletail，学名 Hirundapus giganteus），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，常见栖息地包括峡谷峭壁。

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: These swifts are resident breeders in hill forests in southern India and southeast Asia, extending to the Greater Sunda islands of Indonesia and Palawan in the southern Philippines. They build their nests in rock crevices in cliffs, laying 3-5 eggs
